query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as totalMembers,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as activeMembers,
  SUM(CASE WHEN membershipTier = 'all_access_aces' AND status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as allAccessActive,
  SUM(CASE WHEN membershipTier = 'swing_savers' AND status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as swingSaversActive,
  SUM(CASE WHEN membershipTier = 'golf_vx_pro' AND status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as proActive
FROM members;

  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as activeMembers,
  SUM(CASE WHEN membershipTier = 'all_access_aces' AND status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as allAccessActive,
  SUM(CASE WHEN membershipTier = 'swing_savers' AND status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as swingSaversActive,
  SUM(CASE WHEN membershipTier = 'golf_vx_pro' AND status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as proActive
FROM members;
